title: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 48 Posts
organization: Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL) - Durgapur Steel Plant (DSP), IISCO Steel Plant (ISP) & Alloy Steels Plant (ASP); Maharatna Company
post_name: Young Professional (YP-1, YP-2, YP-3) across Projects Division, Works Division, and Materials Management Division
job_type: Fixed-term Contract for Service - purely temporary; does NOT create any right for regular appointment or employer-employee relationship
job_location: Durgapur Steel Plant (DSP), Durgapur | IISCO Steel Plant (ISP), Burnpur | Alloy Steels Plant (ASP), Durgapur
short_info: SAIL is recruiting for 48 Young Professionals across DSP, ISP, and ASP plants in Projects, Works, and Materials Management Divisions on a fixed-term contract basis, last date 06 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified via email/SMS and SAIL website (www.sail.co.in)
important_dates.pre-employment medical examination: To be notified after final selection
important_dates.joining deadline (after offer): Within 30 days from offer of engagement (no extension permitted)

application_fee.details: Application fee (Registration & Processing Fee) is to be paid online and is non-refundable under any circumstances. Candidates are therefore advised to verify their eligibility before paying the fee and fill in payment details carefully. No request for editing of payment details will be entertained in wrong submission cases and candidature will stand rejected.

age_limit.details: Minimum age is 23 years. Maximum age varies by grade - YP-1: 35 years, YP-2: 38 years, YP-3: 42 years. Age is calculated as on the closing date of application i.e. 06-06-2026. No age relaxation details are mentioned in the notification for reserved categories - all eligible Indian Nationals may apply as per the age limit specified for each engagement code.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions (qualification and experience) as on the closing date of application i.e. 06-06-2026. All Indian Nationals who have completed 23 years of age and possess the requisite educational/professional qualifications and work-experience can apply. B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent must be Regular/Full time from a Government-recognized University/Institution with minimum 65% marks. Work experience must be in Executive Cadre in a Steel Plant/Process Industry/Manufacturing Industry. | Note: Essential qualification of B.E./B.Tech. or equivalent must be Regular/Full time in the respective stream from a Government-recognized University/Institution with minimum 65% marks. For foreign university qualifications, an equivalence certificate from the Competent Authority is required. CGPA scores will be converted to percentage as per University/Institution norms; if no norms are specified, conversion will be proportionate (e.g., 8.3 out of 10 = 83%).

salary_details.accommodation (outstation yps): Company accommodation (2-BHK or equivalent) at Rs. 3,000/- per month at plant location (YP-3 may get 3-BHK/equivalent at Rs. 5,000/- per month), subject to availability. No HRA payable. During initial 3 months, SAIL Guest House/Transit House at Rs. 200/- per day (subject to availability).
salary_details.medical facility: OPD & IPD at Company-owned hospital at any Plant/Unit location for self, spouse, and two dependent children - free of cost. No medical referral facility.
salary_details.self-insurance (mandatory): Candidates must avail adequate Medical/Life/Health/Accident insurance. Premium reimbursable up to limits specified above (on production of documentary proof).
salary_details.official tour/travel (yp-1): Rail – 2AC/CC; Stay up to Rs. 2,000/- per day; Local Travel & food @ Rs. 1,000/- per day (at non-metro locations; 15% higher at metros)
salary_details.official tour/travel (yp-2): Air (Economy, for distances over 500 km) / Rail – 2AC/CC; Stay up to Rs. 2,500/- per day; Local Travel & food @ Rs. 1,000/- per day
salary_details.official tour/travel (yp-3): Air (Economy) / Rail – 1AC/EC; Stay up to Rs. 3,000/- per day; Local Travel & food @ Rs. 1,200/- per day
salary_details.joining travel reimbursement: YP-1 & YP-2: 2 AC train fare from nearest Railway Station. YP-3: Airfare (economy)/1 AC train fare from nearest Railway Station/airport.
salary_details.interview travel reimbursement: Single to-and-fro AC-2 Tier Rail fare (with reservation/Tatkal charges) from correspondence address to interview venue by shortest route (if distance more than 30 km each way), on production of proof of journey.
salary_details.leave entitlement: 1.5 days per completed month = 18 days per year; no accumulation beyond the calendar year. Absence beyond 18 days in a calendar year is not payable.
salary_details.working hours: 8.5 hours per day, 6 days per week; as per allocated shift timing. Young Professionals may be required to work beyond prescribed hours as per work-exigencies at no extra cost.
salary_details.details: Young Professionals will receive a monthly consolidated retainership fee with annual increments based on performance. They are NOT entitled to any other perks, allowances, loans/advances, PRP, Provident Fund, Pension, Gratuity, or terminal/service benefits beyond what is specifically mentioned in the advertisement. This is a Contract for Service - not employment under the State. | Other Benefits:

selection_process: Selection for Young Professional engagements will be based on: (i) Application scrutiny for eligibility; (ii) Computer Based Test (CBT)/Aptitude/General Management/Psychometric Test if applications received are more than 5 times the requirement (shortlisting ratio 1:3 based on test performance); (iii) Personal Interview if applications are fewer than 5 times the requirement - all eligible candidates called for interview. Final merit list is prepared with CBT:Interview weightage of 80:20. A discipline-wise panel (1:1 ratio of selected to waitlisted) will be maintained for 6 months for non-joining/early exit cases.

All applications received by the closing date (06-06-2026) will be scrutinized for fulfilment of eligibility criteria. Candidature is purely provisional and will be verified against original documents at the time of Interview
how_to_apply: Eligible and interested candidates must apply online only through SAIL's official Careers website: www.sail.co.in (Careers) or http://sailcareers.com. No other mode of application is accepted. Candidates must first complete One-Time Registration (if new user) and then proceed to fill the application. Once all required details are entered and the application is confirmed, no editing will be allowed. After confirmation, candidates must pay the Registration & Processing Fee online, submit the application, and download the Registration Slip with Application ID.
Documents to be Scanned and Uploaded (PDF format, max 300 KB each):
Recent passport-size colour photograph in .jpg/.jpeg format (max 50 KB, white background, no sunglasses/dark glasses)
Photograph of running signature in .jpg/.jpeg format (max 20 KB - not capital letters, individual alphabets, or initials)
important_instructions: This engagement is purely of temporary nature (Contract for Service) and shall NOT create any right for regular appointment on any ground whatsoever. It does NOT create an employer-employee relationship with SAIL. Initial tenure is 3 years, extendable up to 2 additional years (one year at a time) based on satisfactory performance - maximum total period is 5 years. Performance is reviewed annually; tenure extension is at the discretion of the Company based on performance and eligibility. During the first 6 months, either party can terminate with 7 days' notice without notice pay. Beyond 6 months, 1 month's notice or 1 month's retainership fee in lieu is required by either party. Absence for 15 consecutive days without prior written sanction may lead to immediate termination without notice. Self-insurance (Medical/Life/Health/Accident) is mandatory for all Young Professionals. No other perks, allowances, loans, advances, PRP, PF, Pension, Gratuity, or terminal benefits are payable beyond those specifically mentioned in the advertisement. In the event of death, injury or illness attributable to performance of services, neither the Young Professional nor family members shall be entitled to any compensation from SAIL. Candidates must join within 30 days from the offer of engagement - no extension is permitted on any grounds. Every selected candidate must sign a Contract for Service agreement with the respective SAIL Plant before joining. Engagement without a signed agreement is null and void. Candidates must furnish an undertaking/declaration regarding good moral character and absence of criminal conviction or pending judicial proceedings at the time of joining. SAIL reserves the right to carry out pre-engagement verification of antecedents and credentials including general character. Adverse reports may lead to termination without notice. Examination centres allotted are binding - no request for change of examination centre will be entertained. Court of jurisdiction for any dispute will be at Asansol/Durgapur, West Bengal. SAIL-ISP/DSP/ASP reserves the right to cancel/restrict/modify/alter the engagement process at any stage without notice or reason, without any liability to compensate applicants. All corrigendum/addendum/notices will be published only on www.sail.co.in - candidates must check the website periodically.
